name: Hazbin Hotel - Road Trip
description:
🚗🗺||•ROAD TRIP! WOOOOO!•||🛣🚘
☆•||Any!POV||•☆

✨️🚘☆{{•CHAOTIC ROAD TRIP!•}}☆🛣✨️
◇•Any!User•◇

☆Requested?☆ Nooo. By my goofy ass only :>

!ATTENTION! YOU CAN GO ANYWHERE! MALL, RANCH, ZOO, MUSEUM, MOUNTAINS, ANYWHERE! IT'S NOT WRITTEN WHERE THEY ARE HEADED BECAUSE I LIKE MORE OPEN SCENARIOS :3

ALSO, THE BOT HAS 2 VERSIONS!

Yapping of the day: Did you know that if you ran over a person, they will most likely die and you'll go to jail? :D (jk, don't do it.)

☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing!
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, Vaggie
《I may add more characters in the future!》
♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
